zh.Crewkerne, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特可福可納
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce  Jacossa Cresset於1470年出生時，她的父親Thomas Cressett29歲，母親Jane Corbet25歲。她和Sir Edward Deol Burton至少有9個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1490年在英國享年20歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cresset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Creasey  .
Probably also an altered form of German   Kresse   or   Kresser  .

variants.name: Creasey
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, or Norman origin): habitational name from Cressy in Seine-Maritime, France (see   Cressy  ).
Possibly an Americanized form of any of the German names mentioned at   Creasy  .

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce  Jacossa Cresset was born in 1470, her father, Thomas Cressett, was 29 and her mother, Jane Corbet, was 25. She had at least 9 sons and 6 daughters with Sir Edward Deol Burton. She died in 1490, in England, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joyce  Jacossa Cresset est née en 1470, son père, Thomas Cressett, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jane Corbet, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles avec Sir Edward Deol Burton. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 20 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joyce  Jacossa Cresset 1470 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Cressett 29 und ihre Mutter Jane Corbet 25. Sie hatte mit Sir Edward Deol Burton mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 20 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce  Jacossa Cresset è nata il nel 1470, sua padre, Thomas Cressett, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Jane Corbet, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie con Sir Edward Deol Burton. Morì nel 1490, nel England, all'età di 20 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joyce  Jacossa Cressetが1470年に生まれた時，父Thomas Cressettは29歳，母Jane Corbetは25歳であった。彼女はSir Edward Deol Burtonとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1490年にイギリスで20歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce  Jacossa Cresset(이)가 1470년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Cressett(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Corbet(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Sir Edward Deol Burton(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국에서 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce  Jacossa Cresset nasceu em 1470, seu pai, Thomas Cressett, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Jane Corbet, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas com Sir Edward Deol Burton. Ela faleceu em 1490, em Inglaterra, com 20 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce  Jacossa Cresset родилась в 1470 г., её отцу по имени Thomas Cressett было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Corbet, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Sir Edward Deol Burton. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 20 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joyce  Jacossa Cresset nació en 1470, su papá, Thomas Cressett, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Jane Corbet, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas con Sir Edward Deol Burton. Murió en 1490, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 20 años.
